Consolidated club identity atoms, event capacity copy, event visual atoms, and status-label helpers; verified analyzer, focused widget tests, cleanup scanner, lab web build, Chrome reload, and git diff check.

Implemented full club interaction-module Hero from Explore Polaroid card to detail header; aligned shared media padding; moved detail title/location into the same display typography; let the photo fill the safe-area header while preserving overlay controls; changed club detail route from horizontal slide to fade/scale so the white tile frame spreads into the white detail page.

Raised the shared club interaction media inset from CatchSpacing.s3 to CatchSpacing.s5 so the Explore Polaroid media frame and detail hero frame sit off the iPhone glass edge with the same larger padding.

Reverted the blunt club interaction inset increase back to CatchSpacing.s3 and added CatchViewportCurveFrame, which derives the active top viewport curve from MediaQuery safe-area/size and clips the inset detail hero to the deflated curve so it follows device rounded corners.

notes: Migrated ProfileScreen away from NestedScrollView + TabBarView to a single sliver-native CustomScrollView. A Profile-owned TabController now controls which sliver body is mounted, and CatchTopBarTabBar accepts an optional explicit TabController so the Profile/Preview row can stay pinned in the sliver header. Device verification remains blocked until the user's iPhone is connected.
Widened Catch UI analyzer plugin to handwritten lib/** except theme/generated, fixed or semantically exempted first full-app diagnostic set, and kept RiverpodLint smoke coverage active.

proof: Improved the device-curve frame from a circular Path/RRect clip to Flutter's native ClipRSuperellipse with a CustomClipper<RSuperellipse> and save-layer antialiasing, keeping the same safe-area-derived radius and base Polaroid inset.

Reverted the blunt club interaction inset increase back to CatchSpacing.s3 and added CatchViewportCurveFrame, which derives the active top viewport curve from MediaQuery safe-area/size and clips the inset detail hero to the deflated curve so it follows device rounded corners.

Implemented full club interaction-module Hero from Explore Polaroid card to detail header; aligned shared media padding; moved detail title/location into the same display typography; let the photo fill the safe-area header while preserving overlay controls; changed club detail route from horizontal slide to fade/scale so the white tile frame spreads into the white detail page.

Improved the device-curve frame from a circular Path/RRect clip to Flutter's native ClipRSuperellipse with a CustomClipper<RSuperellipse> and save-layer antialiasing, keeping the same safe-area-derived radius and base Polaroid inset.

Raised the shared club interaction media inset from CatchSpacing.s3 to CatchSpacing.s5 so the Explore Polaroid media frame and detail hero frame sit off the iPhone glass edge with the same larger padding.

Reverted the blunt club interaction inset increase back to CatchSpacing.s3 and added CatchViewportCurveFrame, which derives the active top viewport curve from MediaQuery safe-area/size and clips the inset detail hero to the deflated curve so it follows device rounded corners.
